title: Crypto Payment Integration for Static Sites: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator based in Nigeria, Gumroad payout delays have left you high and dry, while PayPal's hold periods have put a halt to your sales in other restricted countries. The problem's not just about access; it's about getting paid instantly for your ebooks, courses, and digital products. Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, a $19.99 frontend wallet integration tool, offers a solution to this perpetual payment puzzle.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Crypto payment integration for static sites is a technology that allows creators to receive cryptocurrency payments directly on their websites, bypassing traditional payment processors like PayPal and Gumroad. This means you can get paid instantly, without worrying about hold periods or delayed payouts. It's especially crucial for creators in restricted countries, where access to conventional payment platforms is limited or non-existent.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind crypto payment integration involves using a frontend wallet integration tool like Web3 Wallet Connect to generate a multi-chain QR code that buyers can use to make payments in various cryptocurrencies, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and over 300 more coins. When a buyer scans the QR code and makes a payment, the transaction is verified, and the creator receives the payment instantly, without any middlemen or delays.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is built for digital creators who face geographic restrictions or banking limitations when trying to sell their digital products. This technology is perfect for creators based in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, and others where access to conventional payment platforms is limited or non-existent. With Web3 Wallet Connect, creators can finally get paid instantly for their work, without worrying about hold periods or delayed payouts.
USDT payments are settled on the blockchain, eliminating the need for middlemen or third-party verification.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components that make crypto payment integration work together include a frontend wallet integration tool like Web3 Wallet Connect, a payment processor like NOWPayments, and a static site builder. When a buyer makes a payment, the frontend wallet integration tool generates a payment request, which is then processed by the payment processor, and finally, the payment is received by the creator, instantly, without any delays or middlemen.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with crypto payment integration on your static site, first, sign up for an account on Unchained Commerce's platform and purchase the Web3 Wallet Connect tool for $19.99. Next, integrate the tool with your static site builder and configure the payment processor settings. Finally, generate a multi-chain QR code and display it on your website, ready for buyers to scan and make payments in their preferred cryptocurrency.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
Crypto payment integration allows creators to receive cryptocurrency payments directly on their websites, bypassing traditional payment processors.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more information on setting up a digital products store, check out Unchained Commerce's Shop URL at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Our platform also offers a range of tools and resources to help creators succeed in the digital economy. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can finally get paid instantly for your work, without worrying about hold periods or delayed payouts.
Your Action Checklist

Set up your wallet first — a self-custody wallet like Trust Wallet or MetaMask for USDT and other coins. Create a NOWPayments account and configure your wallet addresses for each coin you want to accept. Set up a P2P exchange account in your country — Binance P2P is available globally and supports naira, cedis, shillings, and rupees. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure it with your NOWPayments API key and product details. Test a real mainnet payment and confirm funds arrive in your wallet within the expected time. Practice a test P2P conversion with a small amount — confirm you know the process end to end before your first real sale. Set up the Admin Dashboard so you have a transaction log from day one. When your first real sale comes in, verify it in the Admin Dashboard, confirm the delivery completed, and convert to local currency through your P2P exchange.
Web3 Wallet Connect generates a multi-chain QR code that buyers can use to make payments in various cryptocurrencies.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
